title: Bridge Essay: Religiosity and Meditation Practice: Exploring Their Explanatory Power on Psycho

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Religiosity, and, Meditation, Practice:, Exploring.

**Religiosity and Meditation Practice: Exploring Their Explanatory Power on Psychological Adjustment.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 30971982. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2019.00630. There has been increased interest in the relationships between religiosity, meditation practice and well-being, but there is lack of understanding as to how specific religious components and distinct meditation practices could influence different positive and negative psychological adjustment outcomes. The aim of this study was to assess the explanatory power of religious beliefs and the practice of prayer, focused attention (FA), open monitoring (OM), and compassion meditation (CM) on psycholog
